# Flexible option separators

## Overview

Test that / and tight | work as option separators.

## Index

* [flexible_func](#flexible_func)

### flexible_func

A function with various separator styles.

#### Options

* **-s** | **--sequence**

  Run in sequence.

* **-s** | **--sequence**

  Run in sequence (spaced slash).

* **-s** | **--sequence**

  Run in sequence (tight pipe).

* **-v\<val\>** | **--value=\<val\>**

  Set a value (slash with values).

* **-v \<val\>** | **--value=\<val\>**

  Set a value (spaced slash with values).

* **-a** | **-b** | **-c** | **--delta**

  Mixed separators.
